description_long: This helmet features a rounded dome shape with a predominantly blue exterior, accented by a white and black stylized bird motif on the front. The surface is weathered, showing patches of dirt and scuff marks, suggesting extensive use or exposure to harsh environments. A prominent vertical antenna or rangefinder is mounted on the left side, extending above the helmet and ending in a flat, rectangular tip. The sides of the helmet have raised ear covers with rectangular detailing, while the back includes a vented panel for possible airflow or communication equipment. The helmet's design is reminiscent of Mandalorian-style armor, with a pronounced T-shaped visor area outlined in black. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for protection in urban or combat scenarios.
description: A weathered blue helmet with a white and black bird motif, featuring a vertical antenna and vented back panel. The design is robust and protective, with a pronounced T-shaped visor area.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white and black bird motif, T-shaped visor, and the vertical antenna on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the raised ear cover, the full length of the antenna, and weathered blue surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vented panel and the helmet's rounded back, with the antenna visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite ear cover, the side profile of the bird motif, and the antenna's attachment point.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One rectangular vent panel on the rear of the helmet, composed of horizontal slats.
attribute_graphic_design: White and black stylized bird motif on the front, with weathered blue paint and black outlines; no text or additional imagery.
